text.title: Ruff for Python and Biome for JS/TS as the Sole Linter+Formatter Failure Modes
text.summary: ≥3 antipatterns observed in the wild. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Python project still runs black + isort + flake8 + pyupgrade individually; 4 hooks, 4 configs.
antipattern.fix: Replace all four with ruff; delete legacy configs.

antipattern.symptom: ruff fires 200 warnings on first run; team disables it.
antipattern.fix: Curate rule selection: start with E,F,I,B,UP; document additions.

antipattern.symptom: biome and prettier both run; format wars.
antipattern.fix: Pick one; if biome, remove prettier from package.json + hooks.
